title: “Inside Track” Webinar Series by the Youth@Work Partnership: Empowering Youth Employability through Personal Development
summary: These webinars are part of the “Inside Track” Webinar Series organized by the Youth@Work Partnership through the Spanish and Hellenic Erasmus+ National Agencies. “Inside Track” includes 5 webinars to be organised from September to November 2026.
participants_from: Eastern Partnership countries, Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Southern Mediterranean countries, Western Balkan countries

title: Play.full.nest
summary: Play.full.nest is an 8-day Erasmus+ Training Course for youth workers, educators and facilitators to explore playfulness through experiential and non-formal learning, bringing more creativity, presence and connection into their work.
participants_from: Bulgaria, Czech Republic, Greece, Netherlands, Poland, Romania, Slovenia, Spain

title: PBA Youth X Culture
summary: Connect youth work & culture! This Leuven networking event helps cultural operators & youth groups build international partnerships funded by Erasmus+ and the European Solidarity Corps. Meet future partners & spark creative, inclusive projects.
participants_from: Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Partner Countries Neighbouring the EU

title: Partnership Building Activity in the field of Mobility of Youth Workers
summary: This Partnership Building Activity (PBA) is specifically designed to unlock the potential of KA153-YOU projects. The activity provides a dynamic space for youth workers and project managers to connect, share realities and develop concrete project ideas.
participants_from: Eastern Partnership countries, Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Southern Mediterranean countries, Western Balkan countries

title: Youth@Work Inclusive Horizons: Empowering Rural Youth through Social Entrepreneurship and Employability
summary: Rural areas are the heart of Europe, but they face modern challenges like depopulation and "brain drain." We believe the solution lies in you. This TC is your space to gain the tools and strategies to champion social entrepreneurship and green growth

title: I have autism, so what - Training for youth workers
summary: This four-day Erasmus+ training is designed for youth workers who want to include autistic young people in international youth mobility projects. Explore autism and neurodiversity, gain practical tools, exchange good practices and build partnerships.
participants_from: Austria, Belgium - DE, Belgium - FL, Belgium - FR, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Liechtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovak Republic, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden

title: Go Green : knowledge into practice”, a conference by SALTO Green
summary: SALTO Green is pleased to announce the organisation of its first annual conference on green transition and sustainable development. The 2-day event takes place in Paris on October 13 and 14.
participants_from: Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Partner Countries Neighbouring the EU

title: European Solidarity Corps: TOSCA – Training and support for organisations active in the European Solidarity Corps
summary:
The training activity aims to support and build up the capacities of organizations that actively participate
in volunteering actions of the European Solidarity Corps, in order to ensure quality and impact in the
respective projects.
participants_from: Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Partner Countries Neighbouring the EU

title: Participation, Engagement and Impact Lab for Multicultural Youth
summary: The training course is intended for organisations that work with multicultural youth or wish to strengthen diversity and inclusion within their activities and engage a broader range of young participants.

title: Agile Project Management and Scrum
summary:
We will talk about agile project management principles and the Scrum framework, providing in-depth knowledge and practical skills for managing projects in dynamic and fast-paced environments.
The course will be held only on Thursdays.
participants_from: Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Other countries in the world, Partner Countries Neighbouring the EU
